prose: **Benzaldehyde Fukui reactivity analysis** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact four-center integrals; no density fitting) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied benzaldehyde.xyz (single point DFT). Mulliken charges (PySCF default). SCF converged. No warnings reported. Most electrophilic site: carbon atom 3 (C) with f⁺ = 0.39938964; most nucleophilic site: oxygen atom 1 (O) with f⁻ = 0.23839906. Command: `cli.py fukui /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/benzaldehyde/benzaldehyde.xyz --method dft --tier standard --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 --out benzaldehyde_fukui_dft.json`.
